# Risk It All: Cozy Couple Room
> Browser-first cozy couple-room sandbox built with React, Vite, React Three Fiber, and TypeScript. The active runtime today is a local single-room sandbox plus an in-app Preview Studio and Mob Lab. Shared-room backend and pairing are future work, not the current app path.

## Canonical Docs
- [README](README.md): project overview, setup, and current runtime summary.
- [AI handoff](docs/AI_HANDOFF.md): detailed runtime truth, guardrails, and next-step guidance.
- [Current systems](docs/CURRENT_SYSTEMS.md): gameplay and runtime behavior that exists now.
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): file ownership and major system boundaries.
- [Codebase map](docs/CODEBASE_MAP.md): fastest repo navigation guide.
- [Mob Lab guide](docs/MOB_LAB.md): imported-mob authoring pipeline and current limits.

## Active Runtime Entry Points
- [src/App.tsx](src/App.tsx): top-level sandbox orchestrator and app-shell state.
- [src/components/RoomView.tsx](src/components/RoomView.tsx): live 3D room shell and scene composition.
- [src/components/FurniturePreviewStudio.tsx](src/components/FurniturePreviewStudio.tsx): furniture capture and Mob Lab host.
- [src/components/room-view](src/components/room-view): extracted room-view hooks, placement math, render layers, and lighting helpers.
- [src/components/mob-lab](src/components/mob-lab): imported-mob rendering and editor UI.
- [src/lib/roomState.ts](src/lib/roomState.ts): active room schema, starter layout, and placement helpers.
- [src/lib/furnitureRegistry.ts](src/lib/furnitureRegistry.ts): canonical furniture taxonomy.
- [src/lib/devLocalState.ts](src/lib/devLocalState.ts): room/runtime persistence and migration.
- [src/lib/devWorldSettings.ts](src/lib/devWorldSettings.ts): separate world-settings persistence.
- [src/lib/mobLab.ts](src/lib/mobLab.ts): imported-mob preset schema and default preset library.
- [src/lib/mobLabState.ts](src/lib/mobLabState.ts): Mob Lab browser-local persistence.
- [src/lib/pets.ts](src/lib/pets.ts): live-room pet registry and owned-pet helpers.

## Current Runtime Facts
- `ownedFurniture` is separate from placed `furniture`; preserve that split.
- Surface decor depends on `anchorFurnitureId` plus `surfaceLocalOffset`.
- Wall decor and windows now support `wall_back`, `wall_left`, `wall_front`, and `wall_right`.
- Wall decor can be dragged across room corners onto a different wall.
- The active sandbox room schema is `DEFAULT_ROOM_LAYOUT_VERSION = 6`.
- The active persisted sandbox schema is `version: 6`.
- Mob Lab persistence is separate and currently uses schema `version: 2`.
- Live pets currently come from `PET_REGISTRY` and are limited to the temporary raccoon and cat integrations.

## RoomView Boundaries
- `RoomView.tsx` is now a composition shell, not a giant all-in-one controller.
- Placement and spawn math live in `src/components/room-view/placementResolvers.ts` and `src/components/room-view/useRoomViewSpawn.ts`.
- Builder edit state lives in `src/components/room-view/useRoomFurnitureEditor.ts`.
- Pointer drag, pivot, and wall-drag gestures live in `src/components/room-view/useRoomViewBuilderGestures.ts`.
- Play-mode interaction flow lives in `src/components/room-view/useRoomViewInteractions.ts`.
- Camera, DPR, and Canvas config live in `src/components/room-view/useRoomViewCamera.ts` and `src/components/room-view/canvasSizing.ts`.
- Lighting and post-processing config live in `src/components/room-view/useRoomViewLighting.ts`.

## Navigation Heuristics
- For toolbar, inventory, or app-shell UI, start in `src/app` and `src/App.tsx`.
- For live 3D room behavior, start in `src/components/RoomView.tsx`, then inspect `src/components/room-view`.
- For furniture/shop content, start in `src/lib/furnitureRegistry.ts`.
- For room save behavior, start in `src/lib/roomState.ts`, `src/lib/devLocalState.ts`, and `src/lib/devWorldSettings.ts`.
- For pets, inspect `src/lib/pets.ts`, `src/lib/petPathing.ts`, and `src/components/room-view/RoomPetActor.tsx`.
- For imported mobs, inspect `src/components/FurniturePreviewStudio.tsx`, `src/components/mob-lab`, `src/lib/mobLab.ts`, and `src/lib/mobLabState.ts`.

## Tooling Notes
- `vite.config.js` manually splits vendor and Mob Lab chunks.
- `FurniturePreviewStudio.tsx` lazy-loads Mob Lab editor and stage modules.
- `src/components/mob-lab/ImportedMobActor.tsx` lazy-loads the heavy CEM and GLB renderers.

## Commands
- `cmd /c npm install`
- `cmd /c npm run dev`
- `cmd /c npm test`
- `cmd /c npm run build`
